items.title: Cross-chain protocol Allbridge halts after $1.65 million flash loan exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The halt of Allbridge due to a flash loan exploit raises concerns about security and trust in cross-chain protocols, impacting liquidity across connected ecosystems.

items.title: Allbridge Core pauses protocol after $1.65 million flash loan exploit: onchain analysts
items.whyYouShouldCare: Allbridge's pause highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, which could deter users from engaging with cross-chain solutions, affecting overall ecosystem usage.

items.title: Grayscale is setting up a quarterly cash showdown between Ethereum and Solana staking
items.whyYouShouldCare: Grayscale's upcoming cash showdown between Ethereum and Solana staking could shift investor focus and liquidity dynamics between these two ecosystems.
